name: Pasta Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the angel hair pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Steam or boil the chopped broccoli until tender.
3. In a large pan, sauté the garlic in a bit of oil until fragrant.
4. Add the cooked pasta and steamed broccoli to the pan with the garlic.
5. Stir in the stewed tomatoes, oregano, basil, and thyme.
6. Cook for a few minutes over low heat until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Serve hot or at room temperature for lunch. Enjoy!
